title: Krishna Water Dispute Tribunal under section 5 dated 25/02/2009
description: Krishna Water Dispute Tribunal under section 5 dated 25/02/2009

[m "w [m 3: KIRIOHJJIV M (fill-[SUSIE W 1;! mm 0!) mum-qns—f flows—11 .1.qu (u) aha—m m—u hm AllVNIfl‘kIOVXLXfl mpufg’ JoWazng27.13 ‘ WEE"! ‘0 'ON 'CIDEDI «wows-om "Li op m -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA:EXTRAORDINARY [Pm 1145c. 301)] MINISTRY OF WATER RESOURCES NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 25th February, 2009 8.0. 543(E).—Whereas, the Krishna Water Disputes Tribunal (hereinafter called the said Tribunal) was constituted on 2nd April, 2004 vide notification number 5.0. 451(E) under Section 4 of the Inter-State River Water Disputes Act, 1956 (33 of 1 956) for the adjudication ofthe water disputes regarding Inter-State River Krishna and iver valley thereof; And whereas, the said Tribunal was required to submit its report and decision under sub—section (2) of Section 5 of the said Act on or before the lst day of April, 2007; And whereas, the said Tribunal had requested to extend the period of submission ofreport and decision for a further period of one year with effect from 2nd April, 2007; And whereas the Central Government vide notification number 8.0. 400(E) dated the 20th March, 2007 had extended the period of submission of report and decision for a further period of one year with effect from 2nd April, 2007; And whereas, the said Tribunal again requested to extend the period of submission of report and decision for a further period of one year with effect from 2nd April, 2008; And whereas the Central Government vide notification number 8.0. 414(E), dated the 3rd March, 2008 had extended the period of submission of report and decision for a further period of six months with effect from 2nd April, 2008; Printed by the Manager, Govt. of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi»110064 And whereas, the said Tribunal again requested to extend the period of submission ofreport and decision for a further period of six months upto lst April, 2009; And whereas the Central Government vide notification number 8.0. 21 16(E), dated the 27th August, 2008 had extended the period of submission of report and decision for a further period of six months upto lst April, 2009; And whereas. the Government of Karnataka approached Hon’ble Supreme Court vide Writ Petition 408/ 2008 to direct the Central Government to reckon the date of constitution of the Tribunal as February or March, 2006; Whereas the Hon’ble Supreme Court heard the matter on 17th December, 2008 and directed that effective date of the constitution of the Krishna Water Disputes Tribunal under Section 3 of the Inter-State River Water Disputes Act, 1956, would be lst February, 2006; And whereas the said Tribunal has requested to extension of me period of submission of its repon and decision accordingly; And whereas after taking into consideration the Court order, the notification number 8.0 211603), dated the 27th August, 2008 and the proviso to sub-section (2) of Section 5 of the said Act, the Central Government has decided to extend the period upto 3lst January, 2010‘ Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by the proviso to sub-section (2) of Section 5 of the said Act, the Central Government hereby extends the period of submission of report and decision by Krishna Water Disputes Tribunal upto 3 lst January, 2010, [F. No. l7/l/2007-BM] s. MANOHARAN, Addli Secy. and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054, -- 2 of 2 --
